column1: “Do you like my pies, Ann?” asked her grandmother. - Ann's grandmother asked if she___________her pies.

"Do you have breakfast in the morning?" - he said. - He asked her if she__________breakfast in the morning.
"Do you always spend your time here?" - he said. - He asked her if she always spent her time_________
